Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride and LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol. These lipid abnormalities may increase cardiovascular risk. Glucose control is adequate, and renal function appears normal. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend monitoring and addressing dyslipidemia as clinically indicated.
